concept.title: About user rights
concept.shortdesc: In this topic, you learn about the different user rights. You can assign rights to or withdraw them from individual users or user groups.

conbody.p: User rights define what a user can do and see when using the application. Administrators can adjust rights for themselves and for other users and user groups. They cannot assign admin rights to users and cannot withdraw admin rights from other administrators.
You can see your current right on your profile.
